overview: Premium luxury ecommerce showcase for Jager Brew, a ready-to-drink cold coffee brand. Features a cinematic hero, product variants, lifestyle imagery, testimonials, and a distribution contact form — all wrapped in a bold black, gold, and white aesthetic.
features: Cinematic hero section with Bold Taste. Pure Energy. tagline
Product variants showcase (Original, Sugar Free, Extra Caffeine)
Lifestyle imagery grid for target audiences
Shop Now product cards with buy buttons
Dark black + gold metallic + blue accent design system
Smooth scroll animations and premium hover effects
